task: Fix LiveLeagueGroupCheckbox filtering — live group checkbox checked state and deselect-from-all behavior
summary: Fixed two bugs in LiveLeagueGroupCheckbox: (1) when Show All is active the checkboxes incorrectly showed as unchecked — fixed by checking isAllMatchesSelected first in getCheckedState(); (2) deselecting a group while Show All is active was a no-op — fixed by selecting all other leagues instead. Added allLeagueIds prop passed from LiveLeagueGroupItem which now derives all league IDs across all groups via useLiveMatchHeadersRunningByLeagueGroups().

task: Refactor live-league-groups.tsx — move allLeagueIds computation to parent to match live-league-group-checkbox.tsx pattern
summary: Removed redundant useLiveMatchHeadersRunningByLeagueGroups() call inside LiveLeagueGroupItem. Moved allLeagueIds computation to the parent LiveLeagueGroups component and passed it down as a prop. This makes the behavior consistent with live-league-group-checkbox.tsx and eliminates N redundant hook subscriptions (one per group row).
